attendees.name: Joana Whitfield
attendees.title: Director of Engineering
attendees.profile: Leads a 40-person engineering org modernizing patient-facing systems. At the summit to evaluate agentic AI for clinical support workflows and to meet delivery partners. Interested in security and governance given healthcare data constraints.

attendees.name: Rafael Ortiz
attendees.title: Senior Software Engineer
attendees.profile: Backend engineer building retrieval infrastructure for internal knowledge tools. Hands-on builder who wants workshop time and deep technical breakouts over strategy content.

attendees.name: Mei Lin Chen
attendees.title: VP of Product
attendees.profile: Owns the AI product roadmap for a retail group taking customer-service automation to production. Focused on adoption, ROI, and the organizational side of AI delivery rather than implementation detail.

attendees.name: Devon Pierce
attendees.title: Field Delivery Engineer
attendees.profile: Customer-facing engineer who ships AI deployments in enterprise environments. Attending to sharpen delivery craft and pick up patterns for retrieval and tool-use reliability. Crosses stacks frequently.

attendees.name: Sarah Kowalski
attendees.title: Data Science Lead
attendees.profile: Leads a data science team responsible for evaluation and quality of production models. Passionate about measurement-first delivery and building the datasets others skip.

attendees.name: Omar Haddad
attendees.title: Chief Information Officer
attendees.profile: CIO evaluating enterprise AI for supply-chain and field-support use cases. First time at the summit; here for the executive track, partner meetings, and to understand delivery risk before committing budget.

attendees.name: Bianca Rossi
attendees.title: Machine Learning Engineer
attendees.profile: Works on secure ML systems and is deepening her retrieval and agent skills. Wants advanced technical content on security and infrastructure. Prefers hands-on labs to lecture-style sessions.

attendees.name: Trevor Nakamura
attendees.title: Startup Founder
attendees.profile: Solo technical founder building a vertical AI agent product. Budget-conscious Explorer attendee maximizing keynotes and expo-floor networking to find partners and early design patterns.

attendees.name: Aisha Bello
attendees.title: Engineering Manager
attendees.profile: Manages a team piloting internal AI assistants. Balancing hands-on curiosity with delivery-lead responsibilities; interested in both workshops and the field-engineering delivery track.

attendees.name: Henrik Sørensen
attendees.title: Principal Architect
attendees.profile: Enterprise architect setting the reference architecture for AI systems across a large financial institution. Focused on scale, cost, and security tradeoffs. Attends advanced technical sessions despite the executive pass.

attendees.name: Dr. Amara Okonkwo
attendees.title: VP, Applied AI
attendees.profile: Leads Meridian's applied AI organization, focused on retrieval and agent orchestration at enterprise scale. Former research scientist in information retrieval; keynote speaker on grounding and evaluation.

attendees.name: Diego Salinas
attendees.title: Principal Field Delivery Engineer
attendees.profile: Ships agentic AI deployments inside Fortune 500 customer environments. Known for pragmatic delivery patterns and honest talks about what breaks in production.

attendees.name: Lena Warsaw
attendees.title: Head of Platform Engineering
attendees.profile: Runs the platform org behind Northwind's customer-facing AI. Focus areas: vector infrastructure, latency, and cost control for RAG at scale.

attendees.name: Marcus Feldman
attendees.title: Distinguished Engineer
attendees.profile: Works on LLM serving infrastructure and function-calling reliability. Frequent contributor to open evaluation frameworks.

attendees.name: Priya Ramanathan
attendees.title: Director of Developer Relations
attendees.profile: Leads the developer community and hands-on education programs. Designs the workshop and certification curriculum for Meridian Summit.

attendees.name: Tomás Ribeiro
attendees.title: Staff Security Engineer
attendees.profile: Specializes in security for AI systems: prompt injection defense, data governance, and access control for retrieval pipelines.

attendees.name: Grace Yoon
attendees.title: Chief Technology Officer
attendees.profile: Enterprise CTO who has taken multiple AI programs from pilot to production across retail operations. Speaks on organizational readiness and change management.

attendees.name: Samuel Adeyemi
attendees.title: Lead ML Engineer
attendees.profile: Builds evaluation harnesses and offline scoring pipelines for production retrieval and agent systems. Advocate for measurement-first AI delivery.
